request_text: Campsite-clean the CHANGELOG duplication before the tasks-py-degod PR lands: root CHANGELOG.md carries a UTF-8 BOM that docs/changelog/CHANGELOG.md lacks (the byte-drift flagged in #2302); bodies are otherwise in sync. Remove the BOM from root, confirm the two bodies are byte-identical modulo the docs frontmatter, verify docs-freshness stays green. Structural single-source-of-truth (symlink vs generated mirror, cross-platform-vetted per DIR-001) stays #2302.
